title: Clever LMS Connect - Gradebook Sync Beginner's Guide
heading: Student
parentHeadings: Clever LMS Connect - Gradebook Sync Beginner's Guide
content:
#### Student

Once you've created a submission, you can also take a look from the student perspective. Please reach out to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#5f36312b3a382d3e2b3630312c1f3c333a293a2d713c3032) to request end-user credentials for testing.

![Description of the image](https://files.readme.io/75652850e1b28a77fc31294588ee7522a7e567f59730d9692bfff45bac35436a-image.png)  
_The graded submission from the student view_
